name: io.github.gulmezeren2-byte/erp-report-engine
description: A guarded, read-only MCP server over the SQL database behind an ERP. The agent sees canonical entities (orders, order_lines, inventory, receivables) - never raw ERP tables - through a provably read-only guard whose refusals are measured by a public benchmark. Bundled profiles: Logo Tiger, Netsis, Mikro.

packages.runtimeHint: Requires the mcp extra: pipx install "erp-report-engine[mcp]". Launch: erp-report-engine mcp -c <your-config.yaml>. The config points at the ERP database via an environment variable (never an inline credential); see the repo README.

packageArguments.description: run the guarded MCP server over stdio

packageArguments.name: -c
packageArguments.description: path to the engine config YAML (connection via url_env, profile, limits)
